description: The inner part or inside of something; the space within. 'Muwi' names the enclosed within—what is surrounded, protected, contained by outer layers.
sound_symbolism: The word turns inward. 'Mu' grounds with contained presence, inside established. Then 'wi' opens gently within, interior space.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'lo muwi' (the interior). Opposite of 'lerua' (exterior). The protected inner space.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Interior design unified spaces—creating harmonious inner environments where every element related.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The interior life matters—inner experience shapes outer action, inner peace enables outer presence.
